coverage.controller_boundary: read-only; edits, shell, network, delegation, and advisor access denied
coverage.quality_assessment: source-adjudicated against a fixed rubric; no blind panel or promotion-quality floor

routes.quality_disposition: One response contained a material source-control-flow error; not selected.
Candidate route: both responses completed the fixed retrieval contract; one required source-adjudicated repair.
Fast provider-pinned challenger; no blind quality comparison or general reader promotion.
Higher-cost provider-pinned challenger with inconsistent source-grounded responses; not selected.

decision.rationale: The isolated exact-file cohort calibrates route cost, completion, and source-adjudication variance. It does not measure full project startup or a native reader-subagent invocation.
decision.follow_up: Use the full-config startup crossover and broader multi-file reader tasks before selecting a reader route.

limitations: One fixed exact-file retrieval workload is insufficient to establish a universal reader ranking.
The two retained attempts per route used source adjudication rather than a blinded citation-precision and recall panel.
The aggregate intentionally excludes source, task, rubric, raw-answer, and session evidence required for independent reproduction.
The five broader queued reader trials and a native subagent-startup measurement remain required before changing the general explore route.
